_comment: LLM-MAINTAINED MODULE MAP. This file is the single source of truth for module boundaries; .dependency-cruiser.cjs turns it into lint rules mechanically — never hand-edit the generated rules, edit this map. Refresh it whenever the folder structure changes (see the setup-module-boundaries skill). Every `path` and `publicEntry` is an anchored regex over repo-relative POSIX paths.

modules.name: example-core
modules.comment: A leaf module. Others may import it ONLY through its barrel; its internal files are private.

modules.name: example-feature
modules.comment: A module with more than one public file — list each as a publicEntry.

layers._comment: OPTIONAL directional rules, off unless populated. Each entry forbids the named module from importing the listed modules AT ALL (stricter than public-entry-only). Use for one-directional layering, e.g. a renderer that must never reach the main process.
